privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data injected directly into the Snipe-IT database via setup_task.sh, establishing the original supplier as 'Apex IT Solutions'. The task instructions explicitly mandate the occupation 'IT Procurement Manager' and the target strings: renaming the supplier to 'Apex IT Solutions (BANKRUPT)', adding the supplier note 'DO NOT USE - Chapter 7 Bankruptcy', and appending the asset note '[WARRANTY VOID - SUPPLIER BANKRUPT]'.
